headline: CVS Health AI Moves Highlight Prescription Safety And Valuation Debate
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) received the 2026 Newsweek AI Impact Award for its AI-driven prescription technology. The company was recognized for AI tools that standardize prescription inputs and support safer medication dispensing across its pharmacy network. CVS Health Ventures made a major investment in healthcare AI startup H1 to improve provider data accuracy. For a company that operates a large US pharmacy and health services network, CVS Health’s latest AI moves relate directly to its core...

headline: Salesforce AI Push Deepens CVS Health Ties As Valuation Discount Widens
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) expanded its Agentforce Health partnership with CVS Health, described as its largest Agentforce agreement in regulated industries. The company launched a Forward Deployed Engineering partner network with TTEC Digital to support AI agent deployments. Salesforce also extended AI powered customer engagement capabilities across several sectors, including healthcare and other regulated markets. Salesforce, trading at $191.1, has seen mixed share performance, with the stock...
